name: Orphaned
text:
You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose:
Exhaust Dick Grayson → remove Orphaned from the game.
Discard each card tucked beneath your identity. If no cards were discarded this way, this card gains surge. Discard this obligation.

name: The Man Who Collects Hearts
text: “I want this city to feel hope. Then I want to take that all away.” When Revealed: Each player places a card with a printed [physical] resource from their hand facedown here. If they cannot, they place 1 threat here. [acceleration]

name: Heartless
text: Heartless gets +2 hit points for each printed [physical] resource tucked under him. When Revealed: Discard cards from the top of your deck until you discard a printed [physical] resource. Tuck that card under Heartless. (Nightwing's nemesis minion.) “Is there someone who will miss you? ...Good”

name: Tear out your Heart
text: In expert mode, this cannot be canceled. When Revealed: Discard cards from the top of your deck until you discard a printed [physical] resource. Tuck that card under Heartless. If you cannot, this card gains surge.

name: Beating Heart
text: In expert mode, this cannot be canceled. When Revealed: If Heartless is not in play, search the encounter deck and discard pile for him and reveal him. Then, tuck each card with a printed [physical] resource from your hand under Heartless.
